titleStmt.title: SII 5.999: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 999. (A.R. No. 134 of 1896). ON THE INNER SIDE OF THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . ṣrimak kittimuṉṉāka komāṟupaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu 40 miṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvakṣa ttu dvi tiyaiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa re vatināḷ
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu śrīmaturān=ta kaccaturve timaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār koyil(t) tirunaṭaimāḷikaiyil pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu coḻakulamāṇikka
nallūrāṉa maṇappaṭai viṭṭil kaikkoḷamutalikaḷil viratamuṭittaperumāḷ makaṉ tirunelveliuṭaiyāṉeṉ Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭaiyār viratamuṭitta pāṇṭīśvara muṭaiya nāyaṉārkkum puvaṉāpatinācciyārkkum
tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyāka śrīparāntakacceri Irāyūrc coṭṭai śrīvāsude vapaṭṭan piḷḷaikaḷil Iḷaiya śrīvāsude vapaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi muttanārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Iḷaiya śrīrāmabha ṭṭaṉum Immuvar
pakkalum vilaikoṇṭu Iṟaiyiḻicci vaytta bhū mi viḷainilamāvatu yivūr tilaippāṭakam viracoḻavāykkālukku teṟkku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟu śrīviraṉārāyaṇavatikku mekku mutalccatirattu vaṭakkileṭṭil
kiḻai ṉālil vaṭakkaṭaiya tākku Iraṇṭuṉāl pāṭakam kava Ippāṭakam Oṉṟe kālum Inṉāyaṉārkkum ṉācciykkum pūcikkum Amutupaṭi kaṟiyamutu tiruppaṇikkumuṭalāka candrāditya varai celvatāka
koṇṭu yiṟai Iḻicci kkuṭutten tirunelveli Uṭaiyāṉen Ippaṭikku Ivai tirunelveliuṭaiyā neḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 5.999 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
